title: crotalaria kassneri
intro: Crotalaria kassneri, also known as Kassner's rattle box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria kassneri include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural insect repellent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its various uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
